subcodes.first_line: O thou distinguished and noble one! With all reverence have I received thy luminous letter and fixed mine attention upon its wondrous [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفاضل الجلیل انی قد اخذت بکل توقیر کتابکم المنیر و امعنت النظر فی بدیع
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @scarcity of receptive souls
